name: Governance Committee Minutes and Action Items.pdf
text:
[Page 1]
Meridian Holdings  Frontend Demo Grounded Corpus
MIN-101  Governance Committee Minutes
Controlled synthetic enterprise document — for retrieval, review, and workflow testing.
Page 1
DOCUMENT CONTROL
Governance Committee Minutes and Action Items
Committee minutes connecting contract review, audit findings, and remediation tasks.
Document ID
MIN-101
Owner
Corporate Secretary
Meeting Date
2024-03-15
Committee
Third-Party Risk Governance Committee
Classification
Internal Use
Synthetic corporate document for demo, evaluation, and retrieval workflows only. All parties, people, systems, repositories, and events are
fictional.
Meeting Summary
Field
Value
Chair
Maria Santos, VP Procurement
Attendees
Elena Petrov (CISO); James Park (Privacy Counsel); Alex Rivera (Security Engineering); Priya Nair (IT
Operations); Olivia Grant (Vendor Management); Hannah Cole (Corporate Secretary)
Purpose
Review Northwind contract posture, audit findings, and remediation requirements before production
launch approval.
Decisions Recorded
●
The committee agreed that the MSA package cannot be approved unless liability, transfer mechanism, and
incident-notification language are strengthened.
●
The committee accepted opening NCR-2024-011 and required correction of the access-review evidence gap before
launch close-out.
●
The committee allowed Procurement to pursue a temporary uptime risk acceptance for the pilot phase only, subject to
compensating controls and monthly reporting.
Action Register
Action Item
Owner
Due Date
Status
Evidence / Source
Negotiate liability cap with vendor legal
Maria Santos
2024-03-22
In progress
CTR-010 Section 7.3
unlimited liability
clause
Draft SCC Appendix for data residency
James Park
2024-03-25
Open
CTR-013 transfer
mechanism gap /
GOV-001
Request revised SLA with 99.95% target
Maria Santos
2024-03-20
Done
CTR-012 current SLA
at 99.5%
Define incident response SLOs
Alex Rivera
2024-03-28
Open
POL-031 REQ-IR-07
“reasonable efforts”
language

[Page 2]
Meridian Holdings  Frontend Demo Grounded Corpus

Page 2
Action Item
Owner
Due Date
Status
Evidence / Source
Set up auto-renewal calendar alerts
Operations
2024-03-18
In progress
CTR-010 Section 8.2
90-day notice risk
Next committee checkpoint scheduled for 2024-03-27 to confirm status of the contract redlines, DPA appendix, and
evidence-pack completeness.
